expected_effect: Reduce broad cheap quoting while preserving selective calm competitiveness.
expected_failure_signature: The branch becomes a near-replay or raises average fees without enough mean_edge gain.
expected_win_condition: Improve calm slices and arb discipline while keeping an incumbent-like pricing floor.
hidden_coupling_removed: The same linear map was cheapening calm flow and widening protection without a gated nonlinear split.
rationale: Keep the incumbent signal stack but use convex protection only above real risk thresholds and concave capped calm relief.
title: Concave relief, thresholded protection
why_not_coefficient_retune: This changes the nonlinear quote map and confirmation-gated spend path rather than nudging incumbent coefficients.
